description: Codex Desktop GUI automation with app-server fallback.

permissions.name: process:spawn
permissions.reason: Start and self-heal the local Codex app-server process.

permissions.name: filesystem:read
permissions.reason: Forward user-selected local attachments and inspect Codex output files.

permissions.name: filesystem:write
permissions.reason: Persist the bound chat, alarm, and recovery state.

permissions.name: network
permissions.reason: Codex app-server may contact the configured model provider.

permissions.name: macos:accessibility
permissions.reason: Inject prompts into the exact Codex Desktop chat.

permissions.name: macos:automation
permissions.reason: Control ChatGPT/Codex and System Events for GUI delivery.
